title: epilobium tetragonum var. virgatum
intro: Epilobium tetragonum var. virgatum, also known as the triangular-fruited willowherb, is a variety of flowering plant in the willowherb family, characterized by its triangular-shaped capsules and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epilobium tetragonum var. virgatum include its potential to support urinary health and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using the dried plant material in teas, tinctures, or capsules.
